title: Regenerative heat exchanger for equipments of positive power efficient ventilation of rooms
abstract: Regenerative heat exchanger for equipment of positive power efficient ventilation of rooms that has a hollow housing (1) and a fixed within this housing thermoplastic flow-trough heat-capacious filling having a plurality of through holes. For the purpose of simplification and cutting of production costs of such heat exchangers said filling is composed of thermoplastic tubular details (2) selected from the group consisting of single tubes and blocks of tubes, walls of which are rigidly joined. It is preferably if said tubular details (2) have cross-section selected from the group consisting of circle, quadrate and regular hexagon and if they have longitudinal internal partitions (4).
claims: Claims 1. Regenerative heat exchanger for equipment of positive power efficient ventilation of rooms that has a hollow housing and a fixed within this housing thermoplastic flow-trough heat-capacious filling having a plurality of through holes characterised in that said filling is composed of thermoplastic tubular details selected from the group consisting of single tubes and blocks of tubes, walls of which are rigidly joined. 2. Regenerative heat exchanger according to the claim 1 characterised in that said tubular details have cross-section selected from the group consisting of circle, quadrate and regular hexagon. 3. Regenerative heat exchanger according to the claim 1 characterised in that said tubular details have longitudinal internal partitions.
